title: Added Local Analytics Tag Promotion API
summary: Moved tag alias promotion and tag demotion preview/apply routes into the local Studio app server while leaving the deprecated tag-server build-docs route unmigrated.
effect: Migrated local app pages can now preview/apply alias promotion and canonical tag demotion through /studio/api/analytics/promote-tag-alias-preview, /studio/api/analytics/promote-tag-alias, /studio/api/analytics/demote-tag-preview, and /studio/api/analytics/demote-tag. The routes reuse existing promotion/demotion helpers, assignment rewrites, alias rewrites, atomic multi-file writes, backups, compact logging, and Studio activity attachment. The old tag-server /build-docs route is deprecated and intentionally not migrated. The standalone 8787 process still remains necessary for unmigrated Jekyll-hosted tag route shells until those shells move or receive a verified local-runtime bridge.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, analytics adapter, config, and promotion smoke files
node --check passed for assets/studio/js/tag-registry-service.js, assets/studio/js/tag-aliases-service.js, assets/studio/js/tag-aliases.js, and assets/studio/js/studio-transport.js
